channel.title: Episodes - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!
channel.copyright: Copyright © Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion! 2026

image.title: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

item.title: Cicerone – Ray Daniels Interview, Ep. 187
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Have you ever wondered what it takes to become a Certified Cicerone? This week on Beer America TV we talk to the founder and Program Director, Ray Daniels, about what the test is all about, how difficult it is, and why it’s a certification worth getting if you work, or would like to work, in […]

The post Cicerone – Ray Daniels Interview, Ep. 187 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2013 Craft Brewers Conference, Ep. 186
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we come to you from Washington, D.C . and the 2013 Craft Brewers Conference! It was a record setting year looking back at 2012 and looking into the future for 2013. Nearly 1000 breweries were represented and nearly 7000 attendees participated in this years conference. Lot’s of cool stuff […]

The post 2013 Craft Brewers Conference, Ep. 186 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we head to the evil House Lannister, and the family that ruled Westeros at the conclusion of season two of the HBO hit series Game of Thrones! In collaboration with HBO, Brewery Ommegang created Iron Throne Blonde Ale to match the color of Lannisters’ hair . Brewed with noble […]

The post Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer Topics: Beer and Creativity, Ep. 184
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we look at the topic of beer and creativity . There have been scientific studies that show the increase in creativity and ideas after having a couple of beers – do you believe it? Check out our conversation and tell us what you think!

The post Beer Topics: Beer and Creativity, Ep. 184 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we explore the beauty and awesomeness of Nitro! Left Hand Brewing is the first to capture the magic in a bottle with their Milk Stout Nitro . The Nitro version is the exact same recipe as the original Milk Stout, however the flavors are more malt forward and the […]

The post Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: New Glarus: Wisconsin Belgian Red, Ep. 182
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we go deep into the cellar with a 3-year-old bottle of New Glarus Wisconsin Belgian Red Cherry! This Belgian style fruit Ale is a limited release that uses over a pound of Wisconsin Cherries in each bottle! It’s been known to cause a rush when it’s released and has […]

The post New Glarus: Wisconsin Belgian Red, Ep. 182 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Beer Topics: Growlers, Ep. 181
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we’re tackling another beer topic – Growlers! These 64oz jugs of your favorite craft beer can be found in most states these days, but there are issues popping up in some areas that have a few brewers up in arms . What could it be? Tune in and let […]

The post Beer Topics: Growlers, Ep. 181 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Since Beer America TV has split headquarters in both Rochester, New York and Savannah, Georgia, we thought we would highlight a local Rochester brewery in this week’s episode . Opening their doors in 1991, the Rohrbach Brewing Company can stake claim in being Rochester’s original craft brewery! Watch and listen as owner John Urlaub explains […]

The post Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
